title: Vanilla Origins Rebalanced
description: Rebalancing the vanilla Origins to be closer to each other, both in power and impact.
body:
This datapack tweaks the normal, Vanilla Origins to be a little closer to each other in power.
Additionally, it grants the Elytrians a buff once everyone on the server can have an elytra, as its main gimmick is otherwise lost.

# Detailed Tweaks
## All Origins
- Added hurt, death, and on-demand noises related to what mob your origin is most similar to.

## Arachnid
Makes Spider noises.
- [+] Spiders are no longer aggressive towards you.
- [-] Can no longer bypass the carnivorous restriction by eating cake.

## Avian
Makes Parrot and Chicken noises.
- [+] Removed Fresh Air (requiring a high altitude to sleep).
- [+] Added side-stepping.
- [+] Added a double jump.
- [+] Removed vegetarian restriction.
- [-] Added Fragile (7 hearts).

## Blazeborn
Makes Blaze noises.
- [+] Can see through lava & swim through it better alongside their normal fire immunity.

## Elytrian
Makes Vex noises. For additional Elytrian experience, I suggest installing [Do A Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll).
- [+] Tweaked Claustrophobia to last less long once you're out from under the ceiling.
- [-] Doubled Gift of the Winds cooldown from 30 seconds to 60 seconds.
- [-] Removed ability to wear gear stronger than iron.
- [-] Added Fresh Air (requiring a high altitude to sleep).

## The Cooler Elytrian
Unlocked once an Elytrian equips an elytra item. This gets rid of this elytra, though, so keep that in mind. Also makes Vex noises.
- [+] Prevents equipping a (useless) elytra, so you can never lose an elytra on your back again.
- [+] Much faster flight speeds.
- [+] Gift of the Winds returned to its normal, 30 second cooldown.

## Enderian
Makes Enderman noises.
- Unchanged.

## Feline
Makes Cat noises.
- [+] Removed its inability to mine stone.
- [+] Night vision is now toggleable.
- [-] Wolves are now hostile.
- [-] Now a carnivore, and cannot eat cake.

## Merling
Replaced with the Axolotl to promote cross-player interaction; underwater bases are still possible, but you are no longer in completely seperate worlds.

## Axolotl
Makes Axolotl noises.
- [+] Can regenerate a bunch of health in a pinch (with a long cooldown).
- [+] Can hold their breath four times as long as regular players, taking Respiration into account.
- [+] Can see well in water.
- [+] Has permanent Aqua Affinity.
- [+] Swims faster.
- [+] Does not sink while idle in water.
- [+] Has Conduit effects on land.
- [-] Slower and weaker while outside water or rain.
- [-] Carnivorous (and cannot eat cake).
- [-] Incredibly weak to fire, and takes double damage in the Nether.
- [-] Aquatic; takes more damage from Impaling.

## Phantom
Makes Phantom noises.
- [=] Added soul flame particles for aesthetics.
- [-] More blocks are unphasable; deepslate and other 'packed' blocks, such as iron blocks, now block your movement.

## The Cooler Phantom
Obtained by drinking a Dragon's Breath. Also makes Phantom noises.
- [+] Phantoms no longer attack you. They still spawn, and they do still attack your friends.
- [+] Phasing has been returned to its former glory- the only blocks you cannot phase through are packed Netherite blocks, reinforced deepslate, and other unbreakable blocks. (Yes, this means you CAN phase through obsidian!)

## Shulk
Fully removed, due to its gimmick of built-in armor and an inventory that is never lost being exceedingly hard to balance.
